content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be augmented by reweighting episodic memory storage based on the intrinsic curiosity signal generated by ICM/RND curiosity-driven reinforcement learning, creating a "priority curious memory" that only retains high-uncertainty, information-dense experiences for downstream active learning sampling. This addresses a key open challenge in modern active learning agents: avoiding memory bloat from redundant low-information interactions that waste retrieval compute and dilute informative sample selection.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
